positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration of a crescent moon and scattering constellations forming a celestial animal, such as a stylized dragon or unicorn, rendered in deep indigo and glowing gold ink. The composition is circular and centralized, featuring clean, thick line art and geometric shapes for the stars. The overall style is vintage astronomical engraving meets modern boho abstract, set against a crisp white background. High contrast, solid black and gold on white, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat vector art, excellent detail, symmetrical composition, elegant.
negative: blur, grainy, artifact, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, messy, clutter, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, out of focus
